title: Members' share capital
doc_html:
§652.3.  Members' share capital

The credit union's financial statements shall classify members' share capital as equity.

Acts 1989, No. 495, §4.
doc_text:
§652.3.  Members' share capital
The credit union's financial statements shall classify members' share capital as equity.
Acts 1989, No. 495, §4.
